summary: Frontend-only re-verification of SaveComponentDialog auth-aware variant after main agent's fix in /app/frontend/src/components/Dialogs.jsx (lines 657-700). All 4 targeted scenarios PASS. The fix is correctly implemented and the bug reported in iteration_9 is fully resolved.

Intercepted POST /api/components body contained private:true and matching name. Verified backend visibility: present in GET /api/me/components, absent from GET /api/components (public).

critical_code_review_comments: SaveComponentDialog fix in Dialogs.jsx mirrors ShareDialog's pattern correctly: conditional Author render on `user` truthiness, Lock/Private toggle row under Author column (lines 676-700), Sign-in CTA for anonymous, and private:user?isPrivate:false threaded into POST /api/components body (line 601). Clean implementation.

Minor cosmetic: same as iter9 — readonly author shows 'Iter10 Tester' (no trailing 'signed in' label visible in text_content because the 'SIGNED IN' badge sits outside the data-testid div in this dialog; in ShareDialog it concatenates inside). Not a bug — visually correct in screenshot.

success_rate.backend: skipped per request (no backend changes since iter9, 48/48 still expected to pass)

test_credentials: Fresh MongoDB-seeded session created: USER_ID=user_iter10_1779157933750, SESSION_TOKEN=st_iter10_1779157933750 (user name 'Iter10 Tester'). Still valid (7-day expiry). One TEST_ component (TEST_iter10_priv_57933750) created during test 3 — owned by that user, marked private. Safe to clean via db.components.deleteMany({name:/^TEST_iter10_/}).
seed_data_creation: 1 user + 1 session via mongosh; 1 private component created by Test 3 submit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter9 bug fully fixed. SaveComponentDialog now switches between auth-aware Author block (readonly div + private toggle) and anonymous block (free-text input + signin CTA). The `private` flag posts correctly to /api/components and backend filters /api/components (public) to hide private items while /api/me/components shows them. No further action required for this fix.
rca of the issue: N/A — fix verified, no remaining issues.
